name: CARDIAC LIPOMA
definition: very rare benign neoplasm; 2nd most common cardiac tumor

demographics.Path: encapsulated spherical / elliptical solitary mass, often very large (up to 4,800 g) by the

dominant_finding: homogeneous mass of ≤ −50 HU in cardiac chamber / pericardial space
discriminating_features: homogeneous mass of ≤ −50 HU in cardiac chamber / pericardial space
mass similar to adjacent subcutaneous / mediastinal fat:

CT: homogeneous mass of ≤ −50 HU in cardiac chamber / pericardial space
MR: mass similar to adjacent subcutaneous / mediastinal fat:
intermediate to high signal intensity on T2WI
uniform drop in signal intensity with fat saturation
